entity.summary: Cross-chain aggregated decentralized exchange and DeFi application with substantial protocol liquidity but a first-party web surface currently showing maintenance status.
entity.notes: Classified limited rather than active because the first-party website returned an under-maintenance response during review, while protocol data still reports substantial TVL. No terminal shutdown is inferred.

evidence.title: Chainge Finance official website maintenance response
evidence.notes: First-party domain returned an under-maintenance response during review.

evidence.title: Chainge Finance protocol profile and metrics
evidence.notes: Protocol profile identifies the cross-chain aggregated DEX and reports substantial current TVL.
